ess , WirelessComposite , WirelessDirector , WirelessToWired , WriteModel , Writer , XMLInclusion , XMPPGateway , XMPPSink , XMPPSource , XSLTransformer , XYPlotter , XYScope , ZeroOrderHold public interface Initializable This interface defines a sub

terface Initializable This interface defines a subset of the action methods for initialization and wrapup. It should be implemented by objects that do not need to invoked during runtime, but should be invoked in preinitialize() (exactly once, prio

be invoked in preinitialize() (exactly once, prior to type resolution), in initialize() (which could happen repeatedly during execution), or wrapup() (exactly once, at the end of execution). Since: Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id$ Author: Edward A. Lee

Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id$ Author: Edward A. Lee Pt.AcceptedRating: Red (cxh) Pt.ProposedRating: Green (eal) Method Summary All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Modifier and Type Method and Description void addInitializable ( Initializable

Description void addInitializable ( Initializable initializable) Add the specified object to the set of objects whose preinitialize(), initialize(), and wrapup() methods should be invoked upon invocation of the corresponding methods of this ob

vocation of the corresponding methods of this object. void initialize () Begin execution of the actor. void preinitialize () This method should be invoked exactly once per execution of a model, before any of these other methods are invoked. void

fore any of these other methods are invoked. void removeInitializable ( Initializable initializable) Remove the specified object from the set of objects whose preinitialize(), initialize(), and wrapup() methods should be invoked upon invocation o

up() methods should be invoked upon invocation of the corresponding methods of this object. void wrapup () This method is invoked exactly once per execution of an application. Method Detail addInitializable void addInitializable( Initializable

nitializable void addInitializable( Initializable initializable) Add the specified object to the set of objects whose preinitialize(), initialize(), and wrapup() methods should be invoked upon invocation of the corresponding methods of this obj

ocation of the corresponding methods of this object. Parameters: initializable - The object whose methods should be invoked. See Also: removeInitializable(Initializable) initialize void initialize() throws IllegalActionException Begin exec

throws IllegalActionException Begin execution of the actor. This is invoked exactly once after the preinitialization phase. Since type resolution is done in the preinitialization phase, along with topology changes that may be reques

, along with topology changes that may be requested by higher-order function actors, an actor can produce output data and schedule events in the initialize() method. Throws: IllegalActionException - If execution is not permitted. preinitialize

on - If execution is not permitted. preinitialize void preinitialize() throws IllegalActionException This method should be invoked exactly once per execution of a model, before any of these other methods are invoked. For actors, this

ese other methods are invoked. For actors, this is invoked prior to type resolution and may trigger changes in the topology, changes in the type constraints. Throws: IllegalActionException - If initializing is not permitted. removeInitializable

initializing is not permitted. removeInitializable void removeInitializable( Initializable initializable) Remove the specified object from the set of objects whose preinitialize(), initialize(), and wrapup() methods should be invoked upon invocat

wrapup() methods should be invoked upon invocation of the corresponding methods of this object. If the specified object is not on the list, do nothing. Parameters: initializable - The object whose methods should no longer be invoked. See Also:

ose methods should no longer be invoked. See Also: addInitializable(Initializable) wrapup void wrapup() throws IllegalActionException This method is invoked exactly once per execution of an application. None of the other action methods should

lication. None of the other action methods should be be invoked after it. It finalizes an execution, typically closing files, displaying final results, etc. When this method is called, no further execution should occur. Throws: IllegalAction

ther execution should occur. Throws: IllegalActionException - If wrapup is not permitted. Skip navigation links Overview Package Class Tree Deprecated Index Help Prev Class Next Class Frames No Frames All Classes Summary: Nested | Field | Constr | Me
